messages.content:
You are HoloGov-V in the complete HoloVerify architecture.
Gov does not choose models. Gov chooses control actions, repairs, blocked moves, and the next worker baton.
You receive deterministic gate results. You cannot call an artifact ready if local gates fail.
Return only valid JSON. No markdown fences.

prompt_object.gov_command: Diagnose previous worker output, preserve correct source bindings, repair gate failures, block invalid moves, and create the next worker baton. Gov does not choose models.

boundary_binding.action_boundary: May clinical operations activate the trial site?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Enrollment authority for consent C11 is pending and not explicitly granted by any source in the current set, violating STD-ZEN-080-P.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: AUTH-ZEN-080 explicitly states 'consent C11 enrollment authority remains pending'.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: The unresolved dependency of enrollment authority for consent C11, as noted in AUTH-ZEN-080 and the state brief, remains open and prevents the action boundary from being closed.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: The activation date (2026-06-28) is present, but the critical dependency on enrollment authority for consent C11 is not met.

critical_features_preserved: Exact source document IDs are cited.
The action boundary is correctly identified.
The requirement for explicit enrollment authority is maintained.
The pending status of consent C11 enrollment authority is accurately reflected.
latest_worker_output.final_answer: ESCALATE. The action cannot proceed as the enrollment authority for consent C11 remains pending, as confirmed by AUTH-ZEN-080. This unresolved dependency, detailed in the state brief and policy STD-ZEN-080-P, prevents the closure of the action boundary. No existing source in this packet grants the necessary enrollment authority, thus the source boundary remains open.
open_blockers: Enrollment authority for consent C11 is MISSING. AUTH-ZEN-080 contains only pending status. No other source in current set addresses this defect. Resolution requires either (a) a superseding AUTH document granting enrollment authority for C11, or (b) a new source explicitly stating enrollment authority is now granted.

action.description: May clinical operations activate the trial site?

context.action_boundary: May clinical operations activate the trial site?
context.anomaly_observed: A feasibility approval exists, but only exact activation authority can close enrollment activation.
context.explanation_summary: Verify whether the closure evidence exactly matches the action boundary before execution.

internal_documents.content: Activation ACT-ZEN-080 activates site Z-12 under protocol P7.2 and consent C11 on 2026-06-28.
Feasibility note FEAS-ZEN-080 approves site Z-12 for startup planning only and is not enrollment activation authority.
Activation authority AUTH-ZEN-080 covers site Z-12 and protocol P7.2 for activation date 2026-06-28; consent C11 enrollment authority remains pending.

policy_documents.content: Trial-site activation is complete only when activation authority matches site, protocol version, consent version, activation date, and enrollment authority before enrollment.
policy_documents.title: Exact source-boundary policy

blocked_moves_so_far: Claiming AUTH-ZEN-080 closes the enrollment authority gap
state_brief.current_position: source-bound action verification with adversarial cross-DNA repair
known_failure_risks: planning artifact treated as execution authority
adjacent source treated as exact source
